title: geum umbrosum
intro: Geum umbrosum, also known as the wood avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The health benefits of Geum umbrosum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Geum umbrosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
